latex:
Peyton and her family are visiting family in another part of the country. They decided that they would take the scenic route, taking a three-day road trip.

\begin{itemize}
\item On Wednesday they drove at an average speed of $55$ mph for $8$ hours.
\item On Thursday they drove at an average speed of $60$ mph for $6$ hours.
\item On Friday they drove at an average speed of $30$ mph for $5$ hours.
\end{itemize}

What was the total distance traveled?
